title: Repository bootstrap
deliverables: README; AGENTS; continuous mission; queue; orchestrator; validation; workflow
acceptance: core scaffolding exists; queue validates; first runnable task is deterministic

title: Evidence-based learner baseline instrument
deliverables: baseline questionnaire; scoring rubric; 78-competency evidence map; primary-secondary track decision aid
acceptance: covers all competencies; self-rating alone cannot certify L3+; reviewer fields included

title: First public reproducibility project
deliverables: lawful public or synthetic dataset case; data dictionary; one table; one figure; one main model; reproduction log
acceptance: clean rebuild works; discrepancies documented; no result tuning; license and provenance recorded

title: Independent clean-environment reproduction protocol
deliverables: reproduction checklist; clean-run script; expected-output manifest; failure postmortem
acceptance: independent run instructions complete; hidden manual steps detectable

title: Question-type and estimand learning package
deliverables: case bank; concept map; question transformations; estimand exercises; rubric
acceptance: descriptive causal predictive diagnostic mechanistic and decision cases covered; transfer exam included

title: Study-design bias and DAG laboratory
deliverables: design comparison cases; DAG exercises; collider mediator selection cases; answer keys
acceptance: at least one flawed case per major bias; adjustment decisions justified

title: Ethics literature and data-governance laboratory
deliverables: ethics scenarios; DMP; CRF; data dictionary; search exercise; AI-use log
acceptance: no real sensitive data; institutional-decision boundaries explicit; sources recorded

title: Probability estimation and inference simulation lab
deliverables: coverage and power simulations; P-value misconceptions; bootstrap and permutation exercises
acceptance: deterministic simulations; flawed interpretations corrected

title: Generalized linear model laboratory
deliverables: linear logistic Poisson negative-binomial nonlinear and interaction cases; diagnostics
acceptance: estimands and scales explicit; common failure cases included

title: Survival longitudinal and multilevel laboratory
deliverables: survival; competing risk; mixed model; GEE; clustering cases
acceptance: statistical units correct; assumptions diagnosed

title: Missingness measurement multiplicity and sample-size lab
deliverables: MAR and MNAR simulations; measurement-error case; multiplicity plan; simulation-based sample size
acceptance: sensitivity analyses included; post-hoc power rejected; SAP and blank outputs produced

title: Observational cohort and complex-survey laboratory
deliverables: cohort construction; survey-weighted case; STROBE checklist; missingness and flow diagram
acceptance: time order and target population explicit; reproducible cohort code

title: Target-trial and baseline-confounding laboratory
deliverables: target trial table; DAG; standardization; matching or weighting; overlap diagnostics
acceptance: time zero aligned; balance and positivity reported; causal nonclaims explicit

title: Time-varying causal methods and bias-sensitivity lab
deliverables: MSM or g-formula simulation; negative-control concept; quantitative bias exercises
acceptance: treatment-confounder feedback represented; weight diagnostics documented

title: Quasi-experimental and RWE capstone
deliverables: DiD or ITS case; protocol; SAP; main and sensitivity analyses; checklist
acceptance: identification assumptions tested where possible; alternative explanations ranked

title: Clinical-trial design package
deliverables: superiority and noninferiority protocols; estimand table; randomization; CRF; sample-size simulation
acceptance: allocation concealment and intercurrent events explicit; no real trial approval claimed

title: Trial analysis monitoring and complex-design lab
deliverables: simulated trial; SAP; missingness; multiplicity; CONSORT flow; safety exercise
acceptance: primary analysis reproducible; safety boundaries clear

title: Diagnostic-accuracy and biomarker laboratory
deliverables: intended-use protocol; reference-standard cases; threshold analysis; STARD and QUADAS exercises
acceptance: spectrum verification and threshold bias addressed; clinical consequences reported beyond AUC

title: Prediction and medical-AI leakage laboratory
deliverables: leakage fault cases; nested validation; calibration; decision curve; external validation; model card
acceptance: patient time and center leakage prevented; preprocessing nested; utility mandatory

title: Basic-experiment design and rigor laboratory
deliverables: experimental-unit cases; randomization and blinding; batch layouts; resource-authentication records
acceptance: technical and biological replication separated; pseudoreplication correction demonstrated

title: Mechanism and orthogonal-validation laboratory
deliverables: dose-time-factorial case; necessity sufficiency rescue and falsification plans; hierarchical analysis
acceptance: claims match evidence; alternative mechanisms and validation specified

title: Bulk RNA-seq reproducible laboratory
deliverables: sample sheet; QC; design matrix; differential analysis; enrichment; versioned workflow
acceptance: batch confounding and identifiability checked; correct gene universe

title: Multi-donor single-cell and workflow laboratory
deliverables: cell QC; annotation evidence; pseudobulk or donor-level model; integration sensitivity; workflow logs
acceptance: donor is inferential unit; cell-count pseudoreplication corrected

title: Systematic-review protocol search and bias laboratory
deliverables: update-value assessment; protocol; reproducible search; screening and extraction calibration; bias tools
acceptance: study and report IDs separated; double-process simulated; current official methods recorded

title: Meta-analysis heterogeneity and GRADE laboratory
deliverables: effect-size cases; random effects; prediction interval; dependent effects; subgroup; GRADE
acceptance: non-poolable cases identified; duplicate cohorts and shared controls handled

title: Qualitative mixed implementation and economics laboratory
deliverables: interview guide; reflexive log; coding case; joint display; implementation logic model; economic model
acceptance: method-question alignment; negative cases; probabilistic sensitivity included

title: Integrated cross-type capstone scaffold
deliverables: concept note; evidence map; protocol; DAG or mechanism; DMP; SAP; blank outputs; risk register
acceptance: clinical statistical experimental omics synthesis and implementation interfaces explicit

title: Red-team and independent reproducibility system
deliverables: red-team casebook; clean-room runner; expected-output manifest; audit report; correction workflow
acceptance: major bias leakage pseudoreplication and conclusion-overreach tests included

title: Graduation assessment and portfolio system
deliverables: unfamiliar-problem exam; unfamiliar-data exam; teaching exam; journal-review exam; portfolio rubric
acceptance: all 78 competencies mapped; fatal-error rules enforced; independent examiner required

title: Full source-version and reporting-guideline audit
deliverables: official-source verification; version and date audit; obsolete-source replacement; maintenance calendar
acceptance: time-sensitive sources verified or explicitly unresolved

title: Full-system integration consistency and link audit
deliverables: terminology and ID audit; cross-module mapping; link check; queue-ledger-status reconciliation
acceptance: all automated checks pass; every competency maps to exercise artifact and assessment

title: Final adversarial review and clean-environment rebuild
deliverables: full red-team; fresh checkout rebuild; risk register; unresolved limitations; maintenance handover
acceptance: P0 and P1 findings resolved; residual human dependencies explicit
